pl.netigen.coreapi.payments

Interface IPayments

  • All Superinterfaces:
    INoAds
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    ICoreMainVM
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    CoreMainVM, Payments

    public IPayments
extends INoAds

    Interface for payments, extends interface INoAds

    Use this for:

    • observe no-ads payments changes,

    • observe owned payments changes (refreshed on application start),

    • observe available payments with details (class NetigenSkuDetails) fetched form store

    • making calls for launch payment flow

    See Also:
    interface INoAds, class NetigenSkuDetails

    • Constructor Detail

      • IPayments

        public IPayments()

    • Method Detail

      • getInAppSkuList

        @NotNull
java.util.List<java.lang.String> getInAppSkuList()

        List of all payments sku available in Application for default it is only one default no-ads sku: packageName +".noads"

        See Also:
        packageName

      • getInAppSkuDetailsLD

        @NotNull
androidx.lifecycle.LiveData<java.util.List> getInAppSkuDetailsLD()

        LiveData with list of class NetigenSkuDetails, use this to get information of current available in app payments

        warning this currently not working/tested in HMS!!

        See Also:
        LiveData, class NetigenSkuDetails

      • getSubsSkuDetailsLD

        @NotNull
androidx.lifecycle.LiveData<java.util.List> getSubsSkuDetailsLD()

        LiveData with list of class NetigenSkuDetails, use this to get information of current available subscriptions

        warning this currently not working/tested in HMS!!

        See Also:
        LiveData, class NetigenSkuDetails

      • getOwnedPurchasesSkuLD

        @NotNull
androidx.lifecycle.LiveData<java.util.List> getOwnedPurchasesSkuLD()

        LiveData with list of payments owned by user (this payments String sku)

        This is updated with each start of application, and with user interaction with payments

        See Also:
        LiveData, String

      • makePurchase

        void makePurchase(@NotNull
                  android.app.Activity activity,
                  @NotNull
                  java.lang.String sku)

        Makes call to current payment implementation to launch billing flow for given String sku.

        It will show the purchase screen to the user

        When user successfully complete purchase, ownedPurchasesSkuLD live data will be updated with this purchase sku

        Parameters:
        activity - activity used to as context for launch
        sku - in-app purchase identifier (sku)
        See Also:
        String, ownedPurchasesSkuLD

      • onActivityResult

        void onActivityResult(int requestCode,
                      int resultCode,
                      @NotNull
                      android.content.Intent data)

        Used only in HMS payments implementation, to handle billing events Not need to be called manually

        See Also:
        Activity.onActivityResult
